ast.name: log
ast.source: Simple Code Formatter Error:
ast.target: 简单代码格式化器错误：

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No code block found!
ast.target: 未找到代码块！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Code block formatted!
ast.target: 代码块已格式化！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source:
Failed to format code block! Maybe the code block contains syntax errors.
See the console for more information.
ast.target:
代码块格式化失败！可能代码块包含语法错误。
更多信息请查看控制台。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Print spaces between brackets.
ast.target: 在括号之间输出空格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use single quotes instead of double quotes.
ast.target: 使用单引号替代双引号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: How to wrap prose.
ast.target: 如何换行正文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Wrap prose if it exceeds the print width.
ast.target: 当正文超过打印宽度时换行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Do not wrap prose.
ast.target: 不换行正文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Wrap prose as-is.
ast.target: 按原样换行正文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Put > of opening tags on the last line instead of on a new line.
ast.target: 将开始标签的 > 放在最后一行，而不是新行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enforce single attribute per line in HTML, Vue and JSX.
ast.target: 在 HTML、Vue 和 JSX 中强制每行仅一个属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: How to handle whitespaces in HTML.
ast.target: 如何处理 HTML 中的空白字符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Respect the default value of CSS display property.
ast.target: 遵循 CSS display 属性的默认值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whitespaces are considered sensitive.
ast.target: 空白字符被视为敏感。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whitespaces are considered insensitive.
ast.target: 空白字符被视为不敏感。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indent script and style tags in Vue files.
ast.target: 在 Vue 文件中缩进 script 和 style 标签。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Print (to stderr) where a cursor at the given position would move to after formatting.
ast.target: 打印（到 stderr）在给定位置的光标格式化后会移动到的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Which end of line characters to apply.
ast.target: 应用哪种行尾字符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Line Feed only (\n), common on Linux and macOS as well as inside git repos
ast.target: 仅换行符（\n），常见于 Linux 和 macOS，以及 git 仓库中

ast.name: description
ast.source: Carriage Return + Line Feed characters (\r\n), common on Windows
ast.target: 回车 + 换行符（\r\n），常见于 Windows

ast.name: description
ast.source: Carriage Return character only (\r), used very rarely
ast.target: 仅回车符（\r），使用非常少见

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Maintain existing
(mixed values within one file are normalised by looking at what's used after the first line)
ast.target:
保持现有
（单个文件内的混合值会根据第一行之后使用的内容进行规范化）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specify the input filepath. This will be used to do parser inference.
ast.target: 指定输入文件路径。这将用于进行解析器推断。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Insert @format pragma into file's first docblock comment.
ast.target: 将 @format 注释插入到文件的第一个 docblock 注释中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Which parser to use.
ast.target: 使用哪个解析器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: JSON with Comments
ast.target: 带注释的 JSON

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lightning Web Components
ast.target: Lightning Web 组件

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a plugin. Multiple plugins can be passed as separate `--plugin`s.
ast.target: 添加插件。多个插件可作为单独的 `--plugin` 传入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The line length where Prettier will try wrap.
ast.target: Prettier 尝试换行的行长度。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Require either '@prettier' or '@format' to be present in the file's first docblock comment
in order for it to be formatted.
ast.target:
要求在文件的首个 docblock 注释中包含 '@prettier' 或 '@format'
才能进行格式化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of spaces per indentation level.
ast.target: 每级缩进的空格数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indent with tabs instead of spaces.
ast.target: 使用制表符缩进而非空格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This Object indicates the Parser is during Recording Phase
ast.target: 此对象表示解析器处于录制阶段

ast.name: description
ast.source: Prettify from the entrypoint, allowing to use prettier on snippet.
ast.target: 从入口点进行美化，允许对代码片段使用 prettier。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Print trailing commas wherever possible when multi-line.
ast.target: 多行时尽可能打印尾随逗号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Include parentheses around a sole arrow function parameter.
ast.target: 为单个箭头函数参数添加括号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Always include parens. Example: `(x) => x`
ast.target: 始终包含括号。示例：`(x) => x`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Omit parens when possible. Example: `x => x`
ast.target: 在可能时省略括号。示例：`x => x`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Put > on the last line instead of at a new line.
ast.target: 将 > 放在最后一行，而不是另起一行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use curious ternaries, with the question mark after the condition.
ast.target: 使用“curious”三元表达式，问号放在条件之后。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use single quotes in JSX.
ast.target: 在 JSX 中使用单引号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Change when properties in objects are quoted.
ast.target: 更改对象属性何时加引号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only add quotes around object properties where required.
ast.target: 仅在需要时为对象属性加引号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If at least one property in an object requires quotes, quote all properties.
ast.target: 如果对象中至少有一个属性需要引号，则为所有属性加引号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Respect the input use of quotes in object properties.
ast.target: 遵循输入中对象属性的引号使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trailing commas wherever possible (including function arguments).
ast.target: 在尽可能的地方使用尾随逗号（包括函数参数）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trailing commas where valid in ES5 (objects, arrays, etc.)
ast.target: 在 ES5 允许的位置使用尾随逗号（对象、数组等）

ast.name: description
ast.source: No trailing commas.
ast.target: 不使用尾随逗号。

ast.name: message
ast.source: import.meta may appear only with 'sourceType: "module"'
ast.target: import.meta 只能在 'sourceType: "module"' 下出现

ast.name: message
ast.source: 'import' and 'export' may appear only with 'sourceType: "module"'
ast.target: 'import' 和 'export' 只能在 'sourceType: "module"' 下出现

ast.name: message
ast.source:
Warning: No LINE_BREAKS Found.
	This Lexer has been defined to track line and column information,
	But none of the Token Types can be identified as matching a line terminator.
	See https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/resolving_lexer_errors.html#LINE_BREAKS 
	for details.
ast.target:
警告：未找到 LINE_BREAKS。
	此词法分析器被定义为跟踪行和列信息，
	但没有任何 Token 类型可识别为匹配行终止符。
	详情请见 https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/resolving_lexer_errors.html#LINE_BREAKS 
	。

This CSTNode indicates the Parser is in Recording Phase
	See: https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/internals.html#grammar-recording for details
ast.target:
此 CSTNode 表示解析器处于记录阶段
	详情请见：https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/internals.html#grammar-recording

ast.source: JSON with Comments

ast.source: Format current code block.
ast.target: 格式化当前代码块。

ast.source: an array of the following values
ast.target: 包含以下值的数组
